description: Bulgarian-to-English Article Translator with Podcast Generation
workflow_note: Update 'status' and commit to git whenever a task is completed. Run: git add .squad/taskboard.json && git commit -m 'Update task board: <task-id> complete' with the co-author trailer.

tasks.title: Python application scaffold foundation
tasks.description: Verify project structure is correct: src/knigovishte_podcast/, tests/, data/ folders exist and __init__.py files are in place.
tasks.notes: Completed in initial scaffolding session. Stdlib-first approach selected.

tasks.title: Audit and update requirements.txt with actual imports
tasks.description: Scan all Python files in my-project and identify all non-stdlib imports currently used. Update requirements.txt to include: requests>=2.31, python-dotenv>=1.0, pyttsx3>=2.90 (already present). Verify pinned versions match actual usage.
tasks.notes: Audit now matches current src/ and tests imports: requests, python-dotenv, and pyttsx3 are the only non-stdlib dependencies in active code.

tasks.title: Knigovishte article fetcher (stdlib-first slice)
tasks.description: Implement KnigovishteArticleFetcher using urllib + HTMLParser. Split into fetch_html() and parse_html() for testability and caching. Support kmedia-article-title and kmedia-article-content.
tasks.notes: Completed. Uses stdlib urllib, HTMLParser, re. Filters out quiz/comment chrome. Punctuation-based sentence splitting as first-slice limitation.

tasks.title: Langbly-backed article translator
tasks.description: Implement ArticleTranslator using Langbly API per decision #2. Wrap requests library calls with error handling. Support batch and single-article translation modes.
tasks.notes: Completed. LangblyTranslator batches title plus sentences in order, reads API key from TranslationConfig, validates batch response shape/count, and surfaces failures with RuntimeError messages.

tasks.title: Bilingual script formatter (sentence pairs)
tasks.description: Implement PodcastScriptBuilder to format Article + Translation into bilingual sentence-by-sentence script per decision #1. Produce script and return as string for TTS pipeline input.
tasks.notes: Completed. Bilingual English-Bulgarian pairs formatted per user template. Tests verify correct sentence ordering.

tasks.title: Podcast audio generation via pyttsx3
tasks.description: Implement Pyttsx3PodcastAudioGenerator to consume bilingual script and produce .wav/.mp3 output. Handle voice selection, rate, volume settings. Save to data/audio/ folder.
tasks.notes: Completed. Pyttsx3PodcastAudioGenerator writes local .wav files to data/audio/, applies optional rate/volume settings, raises on unknown voice selection, removes stale output before generation, and fails loudly if no fresh audio file is produced.

tasks.title: End-to-end pipeline orchestration
tasks.description: Implement PodcastPlan and pipeline() function to wire together fetcher → translator → script builder → TTS. Handle error cases and caching. Expose via CLI.
tasks.notes: Completed. pipeline.py now exposes a default pipeline() factory, caches fetched HTML, writes generated scripts, returns artifact paths in PodcastPlan, and the CLI exposes a scoped run command for full orchestration.

tasks.title: CLI main entry point and commands
tasks.description: Flesh out cli.py with full command set: fetch, translate, build-script, generate-audio, run (full pipeline). Support URL input, caching, output paths.
tasks.notes: Completed. CLI now exposes fetch, translate, build-script, generate-audio, and run with URL input, local HTML reuse via --refresh-aware caching, persisted translation/script/audio artifacts, and focused CLI coverage.

tasks.title: Comprehensive test suite and edge case verification
tasks.description: Write unit tests for all modules (fetcher, translator, script builder, TTS, pipeline). Test error cases: malformed HTML, API failures, encoding issues, missing files.
tasks.notes: Completed. unittest suite now exercises fetcher, translator, script builder, TTS, pipeline, and CLI edge cases, including translator API failures/response-shape validation, fetch-only pipeline fallback, CLI plan/failure paths, and blank voice-name rejection. Verified with python -m unittest discover -s tests -v and coverage report (97% total, translator 94%, pipeline 100%, CLI 99%).

tasks.title: Add build/test/lint automation
tasks.description: Set up pytest runner, linting (ruff/flake8), type checking (mypy) in automated CI. Add GitHub Actions workflow to run on push.
tasks.notes: No build/test/lint tools exist yet per decision. Will add when stack is confirmed.

tasks.title: Project README and developer guide
tasks.description: Write README.md covering: what the app does, how to install and run, API overview, architecture diagram, known limitations, future work.
tasks.notes: Keep concise and developer-focused. Assume readers are familiar with Squad framework.

tasks.title: Deployment and packaging strategy
tasks.description: Decide how to package app for distribution: pip install, PyPI, Docker, or standalone script. Document installation and usage for end users.
tasks.notes: Defer until pipeline is feature-complete. Will depend on Stack and deployment target.
